ocr_findings.description: Printer-types table rendered correctly with 6 rows; 'インパクトプリンター' description wraps across two lines in image but is correctly merged into one cell in OCR.
'試験にはコレが出る！' banner rendered as '試験にはつしか出る！' — same furigana glyph misread pattern as page 397.

reviewer_notes: Page covers printer types table and dpi/ppm definitions with dpi conceptual diagram. Table structure preserved correctly with all 6 printer rows. dpi and ppm body text fully captured. Three image placeholders for diagrams acceptable. Recurring furigana misread on callout banner is cosmetic.
